component.name: Simple Photos
component.summary: Self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted photo and video library

description.p: Simple Photos is a private alternative to cloud photo services that you run on your own hardware. Your library stays end-to-end encrypted and never leaves your control.

ul.li: On-device AI face and object recognition
Offline reverse geocoding of photo locations
Multi-user accounts with shared and private albums
Automatic encrypted backup from the companion Android app
An installable Progressive Web App with optional HTTPS
